LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-10-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JOHN SANCHEZ, AND ECHSAN BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES DID NOT MEET AND CONFER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE STATUTE. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 9, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JOHN SANCHEZ, AND ECHSAN BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The parties did not meet and confer in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the statute. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by December 9, 2022.
